subcodes.first_line: For some time now, the sweet fragrances of fidelity have not been wafted from this sorely-tried bird unto that land and region, and no message of love [3.5s]... ...Glory be to God for this paradise that hath been unlocked in these days, this unifying spread that hath been rolled out!
subcodes.first_line_orig: چندیست که رایحه وفا از این طیر پرجفا بر آن ارض و دیار نوزیده و پیغام محبتی... للّه اکبر از اين رضوان که در اين ايّام
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God
